---
name: Submit New Entry
about: Submit a new Entry
title: Add Entry...
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

Consider using the [Entry Formatter](https://gbdk-2020.github.io/gbdk-2020-gallery/tools/entry_formatter.html)

### Main information:
- Author Name: Name(s) of Author(s)
- Title: Game Title
- Short Description: A short 4-10 word description. Avoid saying: "for the Game Boy"/etc.
- Preview Image: A 320 x 288 PNG format screenshot (Attach to the issue)
- Links:
  - url: "https://url_to_main_website"
  - url: "https://url_to_store"       (**OPTIONAL**, if there is a Physical Release)
  - url: "https://url_to_source_code" (**OPTIONAL**, if source code is available)

### Classification:
- Category:
  - One of the following: Art, Camera, Demoscene, Engine, Game, Music, Simulation, Techdemo, Tool
- Gametype: 
  - One of the following: Action, Adventure, Art, Card Game, Clock, Cutscene, Demoscene, Driving, Dungeon Crawler, Engine, Fighting, Flying, GameBoy Camera, GameBoy Printer, Graphics, Idle, Interactive Fiction, Maze, Memory, Microgames, Music, Paint, Platformer, Programming, Puzzle, QR Code, Racing, Radio, Reader, Remote Control, Rhythm, Roguelike, Role Playing, Scheduler, Shmup, Shooting, Simulation, Sports, Strategy, Survival, Testing, Text Editor, Timer, Tool, VirtualPet, Visual-Novel
- Platforms:
  - One or more of the following: AnaloguePocket, GameBoy, GameBoyColor, GameGear, MegaDuck Laptop, MegaDuck, NES, SMS, SuperGameBoy

### Additional info:
- isMultiPlatform: true/false,  (Whether it has **two** or more of these four platforms: Game Boy/Color, SMS/GG, NES, Mega Duck)
- isOpenSource: true/false
- licenseType (if open source):  Examples are: "MIT", "GPL", "Unlicense", etc.
- isFreeDownload: true/false
- hasPhysicalRelease: true/false
- linkOrMultiPlayer: true/false
- usesEngine: Quoted, Engine Name, examples are: "No Engine", "ZGB", "CrossZGB"
- hardwareFeatureTags: Quoted, Comma-space separated list of tags: GameBoy Camera, GameBoy Printer, Link Port, MBC5 Rumble, MBC3 RTC, MBC7 Accelerometer, IR Sensor, MegaDuck Keyboard
- yearFirstReleased: Quoted, Example: "2021"
- metaTags: Quoted, Example: "gbcompo23"  (Competitions, jams, etc that the game was a part of)
- usedGenAI: Quoted, Comma separated list with one or more of the following: "ai-code", "ai-assets". (left empty if none or not known)
